notes_for_human_reviewer: Strong submission, near ceiling. Phase diagnosis traces backward correctly ('underneath, the planning question - How will it be done? - has not been answered'). Transition explicitly named (planning-to-execution) with three specific symptoms quoted. Artifact-vs-understanding distinction is the central thread. Methodology angle uses the sprint cadence as the lever rather than treating the methodology as decoration — strong but doesn't hit ceiling because it doesn't fully separate waterfall logic from agile logic in the recovery (only 4). Concrete intervention names participants, agenda, time-box, definition of ready. This is what a hire-ready coordinator looks like. Tolerance 1 across all dims; this fixture should be a clean pass for a calibrated grader.
